pokemon:capsakid.name: Capsakid
pokemon:capsakid.summary: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.
Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

pokemon:scovillain.name: Scovillain
pokemon:scovillain.summary: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.
